subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from a penitent servant unto him who hath attained unto the lights of guidance on the Day when the Sun shone forth from the horizon of holiness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من عبد منیب الی الذی فاز بانوار الهدی فی یوم الذی اشرقت الشمس عن افق قدس
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @suffering and imprisonment, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @free will and predestination; fate, @station of the Manifestation of God
